Additionally, it’s worth noting that while all three main forms of non-melanotic skin cancer—basal cell carcinoma, squamous cell carcinoma, and actinic keratoses—are influenced by cumulative UV exposure, BCC tends to occur in areas most commonly exposed to the sun like the face, neck, and hands.
